$comment: Declared downstream tasks for the RF-Benchmark-Hub leaderboard. The site generator (leaderboard/site/generate.py) renders EVERY task listed here: tasks with valid result JSONs render full leaderboard tables/plots; tasks without results render a WIP card + a minimal WIP page. Canonical task ids, titles, priority (P1/P2/P3) and scope buckets mirror docs/DOWNSTREAM_TASKS.md. 'status' is the declared build state: implemented (has or will have results), wip (task/track defined, baseline pending), planned (blocked / out-of-current-scope, e.g. CSI/channel-domain). Keep this list in sync with docs/DOWNSTREAM_TASKS.md.

tasks.title: Automatic modulation classification
tasks.blurb: Predict the modulation scheme of a raw-IQ window (RadioML 2016.10a, full SNR range). The board's most mature track.

tasks.title: Specific emitter identification
tasks.blurb: Identify the transmitting device from hardware imperfections (WiSig), with closed-set / cross-receiver / cross-day tracks.

tasks.title: Wideband detection
tasks.blurb: Locate and identify signals in time-frequency (RadDet), primary mAP with mAR and IoU.

tasks.title: Spectrum sensing
tasks.blurb: Per-subband occupancy detection under a target false-alarm rate (DeepSense, pd@pfa=0.1). Track defined; no baseline submitted yet.

tasks.title: Interference identification
tasks.blurb: Multi-class jamming / interference recognition (GNSS jamming 6-class IQ). Task added; baseline pending cluster training.

tasks.title: Protocol / technology identification
tasks.blurb: Recognise the WiFi 802.11 standard (ax/b/n/g) from raw IQ (T-PRIME). Task added; baseline pending cluster training.

tasks.title: SNR / mobility recognition
tasks.blurb: Joint (SNR bin x mobility/Doppler regime) classification on spectrograms (DeepMIMO Phoenix). Spectrogram track; dataset + baseline pending.

tasks.title: Beam prediction
tasks.blurb: Best-beam / beam-index prediction from CSI (DeepMIMO). CSI/channel-domain — out of the current terrestrial-IQ scope; separate CSI track.

tasks.title: Direction finding
tasks.blurb: Angle-of-arrival estimation from a multi-antenna array. Blocked on a public multi-rx dataset (both FM evals use private OTA testbeds).

tasks.title: Line-of-sight / NLOS
tasks.blurb: Line-of-sight vs non-line-of-sight classification from CSI (DeepMIMO). CSI/channel-domain — out of current scope; separate CSI track.

tasks.title: Positioning
tasks.blurb: Localization / geolocation from CSI (5G NR, mean positioning error in metres). CSI-domain + needs a regression-metric protocol entry.

tasks.title: Human activity recognition
tasks.blurb: Human activity recognition from WiFi CSI (6-class). CSI-sensing domain — out of the current signal scope; separate CSI / RF-sensing track.

tasks.title: Channel estimation
tasks.blurb: MIMO-OFDM channel estimation (regression to MSE). CSI/channel-domain + needs a regression-metric protocol entry; separate CSI track.
